caption: The video features a man sitting inside what appears to be an ambulance, as indicated by the visible cross symbol on the window behind him. He is wearing a light gray polo shirt and a lanyard with an ID badge. The man has short, graying hair and a mustache. He seems to be speaking about a particularly sad case he remembers, as suggested by the subtitle at the bottom of the screen. His expression is serious and reflective, indicating that he is recounting a significant or emotional experience. The setting suggests that he might be a medical professional or someone involved in emergency services, sharing his thoughts or memories related to his work.
